rule_text: At least three compliant supplier options must be compared above EUR/CHF 100000
Mobile workstation requests above 50 units require compatibility review with engineering or CAD lead
Break-fix pool replenishment below EUR/CHF 75000 may use fast-track approval with one quote
Requests marked with data residency constraint must be evaluated only against suppliers supporting residency requirements
Managed platform requests above EUR/CHF 250000 require security architecture review
Reception and lounge projects require business design sign-off before award
Named consultant CVs or equivalent capability profiles are required above 60 consulting days
Cybersecurity advisory suppliers must demonstrate relevant certifications or equivalent references
SEM proposals should include performance baseline or benchmark assumptions
Influencer campaigns require brand-safety review before final award
